sections.paragraph: , יְדֻתוּן, & יְדִיתוּן 1Ch 16:38 (“praising,” “celebrating,” from the obsolete noun יְדוּת praise, praisings; root יָדָה Hiphil, to praise, with the addition of the termination וּן), [Jeduthun], pr.n. of a Levite, set by David as chief over a choir, 1Ch 9:16 16:38 , 41 1Ch 16:41, 42 1Ch 16:42 25:1 also of his descendants, who were themselves musicians, 2Ch 35:15 Neh 11:17 Psa 39:1 62:1 77:1 .
